summary: A hot 1980 show captured on a very good front‑of‑house tape with top‑form playing and beautiful slide guitar.
review: Reviewers rave about the performance, calling it "top form" and praising the beautiful slide work. The recording is described as a very good FOH (front‑of‑house) tape that still holds up after decades, though one reviewer notes an even better tape exists. Overall the show and its capture are highly regarded.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are 4‑5 stars, consistently highlighting strong performance and good recording quality; only a minor comment about an alternative tape tempers the rating slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as "very good" with clear sound; no specific flaws are mentioned, though one note that a superior tape exists suggests minor limitations.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the band was in top form throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Beautiful slide guitar highlighted by reviewers.
